word: H6450 - פַּס דַּמִּים - Paç Dammîym - pas dam-meem' - Pas-dammim

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּס דּמּים

Transliteration: pas dammı̂ym

Phonetic: pas dam-meem'

BDB Definition:

Pas-dammim = "boundary of blood"
  1. a place in western Judah

Origin: from H6446 and the pl. of H1818

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
